kw.name: Login With Invalid Credentials
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bankApi, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/invalidUser/invalidPass path_url=/parabank/services/bank/login/invalidUser/invalidPass headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/invalidUser/invalidPass status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 07:28:54 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=UTF-8', 'Content-Length': '32', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e90f2edd0b90f3-BOM'} body=Invalid username and/or password
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Verify login API rejects invalid credentials
